title: It turns out the new character is Hideaki Anno
display_title: It turns out the new character is Hideaki Anno
wikitext:
[]: It turns out the new character is Hideaki Anno.             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jun 21, 2007 6:27 pm Wouldn't that be great?

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Jun 21, 2007 6:32 pm ...... I wonder if Shinji and Anno would get along.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 21, 2007 6:33 pm Quick! To photoshop!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jun 21, 2007 7:31 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: ...... I wonder if Shinji and Anno would get along.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Jun 21, 2007 8:39 pm Hmm, I wonder how Anno would look in a Plugsuit?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 21, 2007 11:05 pm TriLink12 wrote: Hmm, I wonder how Anno would look in a Plugsuit?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Jun 21, 2007 11:09 pm Instead of Anno, I was really hoping for some more hot Tiffany Grant in plugsuit action.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jun 21, 2007 11:41 pm Come, now. I'm sure when LAEM is released we'll get to see both Tiffany Grant and Matt Greenfield in plugsuits! =D

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Jun 21, 2007 11:43 pm MUST RESIST URGE TO MAKE UNPLEASANT COMMENT ABOUT MS. GRANT! How about sum Anno as an Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Fri Jun 22, 2007 12:08 am When the Angel attacks, he'd run out and start doing the Ultraman arm beam thing at it. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 22, 2007 1:12 am

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 22, 2007 5:18 am Man we all know the new Eva pilot is going to the reborn Kamina! P.S. How long do you fifure until GAINAX starts putting out artwork and figures of Gurren-Lagann characters in plug suits? I give it another month. Nia's would have a big flower on her ass. And Yoko's would be the first Two-Piece Plugsuit

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Jun 22, 2007 11:20 am NAveryW wrote: Come, now. I'm sure when LAEM is released we'll get to see both Tiffany Grant and Matt Greenfield in plugsuits! =D

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Jun 22, 2007 12:22 pm cat42 wrote: MUST RESIST URGE TO MAKE UNPLEASANT COMMENT ABOUT MS. GRANT! How about sum Anno as an Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Hailtheplatypus » Fri Jun 22, 2007 12:34 pm CorporalChaos wrote: cat42 wrote: MUST RESIST URGE TO MAKE UNPLEASANT COMMENT ABOUT MS. GRANT! How about sum Anno as an Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 22, 2007 6:20 pm Hailtheplatypus wrote: To be perfectly honest I dont really want new characters in EVA. I think that the characters it has now are perfect for the ideas reflected in the series, and any attempt to change that risk losing the dynamic characters that made the show entertaining.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 22, 2007 7:00 pm I somehow doubt they'll be including Jet Alone this time around.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jun 22, 2007 7:26 pm :x Talk about a filler episode!

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Fri Jun 22, 2007 8:34 pm May I ask, why Mana. Is the other character you mentioned the one that was pregnant with an angel or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jun 23, 2007 3:17 am I'm of the opinion New Characters means NEW CHARACTERS. So no- I'm 110% no characters from the wide amount of side fictions of Eva will make any appearances in REBUILD. So no Mana, no Mayumi, none of those other Bridge Bunnies, none of them. You're new charcter showing up in 2 is clearly going to be a GIRL. Easier to sell merchandise of and maybe another element to add to Shinji's dynamic relationships with women (if that remains the focus). My guess is it times for a glasses girl.
